notes: The criteria preserve the prior hard gates and add explicit quality-equivalence thresholds.
The gpt-5.5/xhigh output is retained as both the baseline anchor and an actual candidate profile.
Candidates may pass with different section ordering or field names if blocked-run, synthetic-stub, owner-acceptance, and measurement-rule boundaries remain explicit.
limitations: Evaluation was performed on public synthetic fixtures only.
No private run truth, real simulator artifact, waveform, or owner decision packet was used.
No independent subagent runner was exposed; candidate generation used ephemeral codex exec CLI runs.
